message:
audit: batch 478 — process.rs SOUND, 3 agents running on supervision+channels+sync

process.rs (1863L): kill_on_drop reap strategy with proper fallback
chain. Arc<Mutex<Option<Child>>> prevents double-reap race.

3 deep audit agents in progress:
- supervision.rs (8362L) + gen_server.rs (5778L)
- broadcast.rs + oneshot.rs + watch.rs
- mutex.rs + rwlock.rs + semaphore.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
